canonicalPreference: Prefer non-itinerary outlines over itinerary files.
Use generated Markdown files under course/documents-markdown as the curation source.
Within the same title group, prefer the larger file as the richer outline.
rules.hrdClaimable: Not inferred here. Course JSON must stay false unless confirmed from source review.
